---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for a Mylesoft product
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, needs-review
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you're requesting.

## 📦 Product / Repo
- [ ] EduMyles
- [ ] EduRyde
- [ ] MylesCare
- [ ] MylesCRM
- [ ] AgriMyles
- [ ] Myles AI
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🎯 Problem This Solves
Describe the problem or limitation this feature would address.
_e.g. "As a school admin, I struggle to... because..."_

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this feature to work.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## 📊 Impact
Who would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Students
- [ ] Teachers
- [ ] School Admins
- [ ] Parents
- [ ] Finance Officers
- [ ] Super Admins
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📸 Mockups / References
If applicable, add mockups, wireframes, or links to similar features elsewhere.

## 📋 Additional Context
Any other context or information about the feature request.
